title: 100+ organisations call for a more ambitious budget for culture in AgoraEU
content:
Culture Action Europe has initiated an open letter addressed to EU policymakers on the future of Creative Europe in the next long-term EU budget. More than 100 cultural organisations, networks, and institutions from across Europe have signed the open letter so far, which makes the case for a stronger dedicated Culture strand in the new AgoraEU programme.

Together, we call for at least 25% of the budget of the new AgoraEU programme to be allocated to its cultural component, while also calling for more accessible funding procedures, stronger support for international cultural cooperation, and fair pay and social security guarantees. 

read the full letter
